bead.title: Route only from client inputs and the models snapshot
bead.description:
Refactor/verify autorouting purity: ResolveRoute and Execute autorouting decisions must consume only explicit client inputs plus the current fiz models snapshot.

No hidden provider-health, quota, discovery, or utilization probes should run in the scorer or candidate builder. Freshness updates are done by the snapshot refresh path before routing, not by a parallel route-side fact path. This makes routing decisions replayable from snapshot fixtures and operator-visible via fiz models.

Hard gates remain allowed for true constraints or dispatchability represented in the snapshot: exact pins/pin conflicts, no_remote, metered actual-spend refusal, missing required tools/context/reasoning, known down endpoints, quota exhausted, and policy require[] constraints. Unknown/stale/refresh_failed facts should normally become penalties unless the snapshot explicitly says known-down or exhausted.

In scope: service ResolveRoute inputs, internal routing input projection, tests with fixture snapshots and fake providers that panic if probed.

Out of scope: changing score weights; changing fiz models CLI behavior.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test . ./internal/routing/... ./internal/modelregistry/... -run 'Test.*Route.*Snapshot|Test.*Autorouting.*Snapshot|Test.*NoProviderProbe|Test.*ResolveRoute' -count=1 passes.
2. A test constructs a snapshot fixture and client inputs, disables provider probing, and ResolveRoute produces the expected decision.
3. A test proves routing does not call provider health/quota/model discovery directly when snapshot fields are present.
4. rg -n 'probeProviderStatus|HealthCheck|Refresh|Discover|quota.*Refresh' service_routing.go internal/routing returns no route-decision production call path except explicit snapshot refresh orchestration outside scoring.
5. Route errors for no_remote + all-local-down and metered opt-out + only-metered-candidates identify the user constraint that prevents selection.

events.body: {"rationale":"","score":0,"suggested_fixes":null,"waivers_applied":null,"warning":"lint hook: dispatch-failure: ResolveRoute: policy \"air-gapped\" has no candidate satisfying local endpoint: 5 candidates rejected"}
